news.title: Can tech companies learn to love cheaper AI models?
news.summary: If those same AI workloads can be handled by cheaper models without affecting quality, it would mean a massive shift in the economics of AI.

news.title: WWDC 2026: Everything announced on Siri AI, iOS 27, Apple Intelligence, and more
news.summary: Apple primarily made the case for an improved experience with its long-standing Siri assistant, which like most other announcements had a hefty helping of AI.

news.title: CISA gives US federal agencies three days to fix a VPN bug under attack by a ransomware gang
news.summary: Check Point said hackers broke into dozens of organizations by exploiting a VPN bug in several of its products used across the government.

news.title: Anthropic’s Claude Fable 5 is a version of Mythos the public can access today
news.summary: Anthropic is releasing Claude Fable 5, its first Mythos-class model available to the public. The model comes with guardrails that block responses in high-risk areas like cybersecurity and biology.

news.title: Rivian starts deliveries of its all-important R2 SUV
news.summary: Founder and CEO RJ Scaringe has called it "maybe the most important thing we've launched to date."

news.title: Nintendo is playing things too safe

news.title: Apple wants Europe to blink
news.summary: It took a few years, but Apple finally made its AI look useful. Now millions of iPhone users in Europe are being told they won't be getting Siri AI anytime soon, if ever - and Apple wants them to blame the EU. Apple says its new AI-powered Siri will not launch on iPhones and iPads […]

news.title: NASA assigns crew for Artemis III, sets aggressive timeline for flying it
news.summary: "Artemis III will be an extraordinary demonstration of what is possible."

news.summary: The chances are low, but not zero.

news.summary: Meta won't say why or whether it's coming back.

news.summary: US Navy’s Task Force 59 achieved the drone rescue at sea near Strait of Hormuz.

news.title: MacOS 27 Golden Gate: Top New Features
news.summary: Apple has announced the latest version of macOS. It’s all about the reintroduction of Siri, which is now accessible from anywhere on the Mac desktop.

news.title: The Top New Features in Apple’s iOS 27 and iPadOS 27
news.summary: Apple took the wraps off iOS 27 at its WWDC event, and the iPhone update is chock-full of smart upgrades, with a big focus on improvements to Siri.

news.title: Anthropic Offers Mythos Upgrade for Cyber Partners and a ‘Safe’ Version for the Rest of You
news.summary: Anthropic is releasing Claude Mythos 5 to trusted organizations and Claude Fable 5 to the public, a version it says can’t be used for cyberattacks.

news.title: Longevity Startup Doses First Human in Bid to Reverse Age-Related Sight Loss
news.summary: The FDA recently approved the cellular rejuvenation therapy ER-100 for human clinical trials. While vision is the first target, it could have applications for a variety of age-related disease.

news.title: Rivian R2 2026: Specs, Price, Availability
news.summary: With a competitive price, winning design, and better performance than the R1, Rivian could be set to break into the big leagues. Just make sure you get the right model with the right tech.
